query:
SELECT 
  send_ready_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS project_count
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.id,
    CASE 
      WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) = 0 THEN '0 send_ready'
      WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) = 1 THEN '1 send_ready'
      WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) = 2 THEN '2 send_ready'
      WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) >= 3 THEN '3+ send_ready'
    END AS send_ready_bucket
  FROM projects p
  LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  GROUP BY p.id
) sub
GROUP BY send_ready_bucket
ORDER BY send_ready_bucket;
